Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production And To Compel Production Of Documents; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Blake J. Lawit, Esq., appeared for defendant & moving party: Sakti International Corp.
Emi Gusukuma, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff & opposing party: Ross J. Boyert

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Sakti International Corporation, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Request For Production And To Compel The Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as to Numbers 47, 53, and 58 as they invade Plaintiff's right to financial privacy without a showing of good cause. The motion is granted as to Numbers 48 and 80. Any documents for which a claim of privilege is made shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Set For Trial On Apr-14-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-26-08 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 501
